ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of the material (e.g., metal, ceramic, polymer) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the material was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the material was last updated */,
  "material_grade" TEXT /* Grade or quality of the material */,
  "material_purity" REAL /* Purity percentage of the material */,
  "material_color" TEXT /* Color of the material */,
  "material_form" TEXT /* Form of the material (e.g., powder, sheet, rod) */,
  "material_composition" TEXT /* Chemical composition of the material */,
  "material_certifications" TEXT /* Certifications the material has (e.g., ISO, ANSI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property record */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material the properties belong to */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the properties were measured */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the material */,
  "specific_heat" REAL /* Specific heat of the material */,
  "thermal_conductivity" REAL /* Thermal conductivity of the material */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X-coordinate of the measurement */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the measurement */,
  "z_coordinate" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the measurement */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the properties were tested */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used for testing the properties */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure at which the properties were measured */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at which the properties were measured */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the property data (e.g., experimental, literature) */,
  "data_reliability" INTEGER /* Reliability of the data (1-5, where 5 is the most reliable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_properties_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_properties_test_method FOREIGN KEY ("test_method") REFERENCES test_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the test method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test method */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the test method */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the test method */,
  "method_references" TEXT /* References or standards the method is based on */,
  "method_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used for the test method */,
  "method_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in minutes */,
  "method_cost" REAL /* Cost of the test method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material variant */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base material */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant */,
  "variant_description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variant was last updated */,
  "variant_grade" TEXT /* Grade or quality of the variant */,
  "variant_purity" REAL /* Purity percentage of the variant */,
  "variant_form" TEXT /* Form of the variant */,
  "variant_composition" TEXT /* Chemical composition of the variant */,
  "variant_certifications" TEXT /* Certifications the variant has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_variants_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the material */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the material was updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who updated the material */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "previous_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous version of the material */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete, add) */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the change (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_by" TEXT /* User who approved the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_history_previous_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_version_id") REFERENCES material_history ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_history_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., material scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user (1-5, where 5 is the highest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the material */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material the document belongs to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., datasheet, test report) */,
  "doc_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "doc_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "doc_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_version" INTEGER /* Version of the document */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  "document_author" TEXT /* Author of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_documents_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property record */,
  "test_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test method used */,
  "test_result" REAL /* Result of the test */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the test result */,
  "test_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the test result */,
  "result_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty of the test result */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_test_results_test_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_method_id") REFERENCES test_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_test_results_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES material_properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project or product */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was used */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the material used */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the quantity (e.g., kg, m^3) */,
  "usage_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the usage */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Project manager */,
  "usage_approval" TEXT /* Approval status of the usage (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "usage_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_usage_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)
